name: v07-sse-publish
description: v0.7 PR 3 demo — companion to v07-sse-stream. POST `{event, data}` to /v07-sse-publish (legacy dispatch URL) and every SSE client connected to /sse/demo receives the event in real time via @blokjs/sse-publish. Demonstrates the in-process pub/sub model: publishers (HTTP, Cron, Worker, WS) and subscribers (SSE) decouple through the bus.
